name: chain_were_making_money_in_the_wedding_indust
method: We're making money in the wedding industry and here's what nobody told us before

stages.task: Scrape wedding vendor listings from The Knot, WeddingWire, Google Maps for target metro areas. Extract: business name, phone, website URL, review count, rating, category (photographer/DJ/florist/planner/venue)
Score vendors by gap signal: high reviews + no website or bad website = hot lead. Filter for vendors with 10+ reviews and no modern web presence. Dedupe against existing LOCAL_BIZ leads

Generate personalized cold outreach using vendor name, category, review count. Pitch: website/booking page/SEO service. Use templates from existing cold outbound infrastructure. Wedding vendors have seasonal urgency (peak booking Jan-Mar for summer weddings)
